political.s: FEC: $18K PAC donations; 78% to Republican, 22% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $3M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.08% of revenue).
charity.amt: Millions distributed over foundation history; specific annual totals not publicly disclosed
charity.focus: Military families, food insecurity, education, community support

animals.s: Mercy For Animals: Cracker Barrel cage-free + broiler welfare commitments on track. [MFA on track]

wiki.extract: CBOCS Properties, Inc., doing business as Cracker Barrel, is an American chain of restaurant and gift stores with a Southern country theme. The company's headquarters are in Lebanon, Tennessee, where Cracker Barrel was founded by Dan Evins and Tommy Lowe in 1969. The chain's early locations were positioned near Interstate Highway exits in the Southeastern and Midwestern United States, but expanded across the country during the 1990s and 2000s. As of August 10, 2023, the company operates 660 stores in 45 states.

health.s: 12 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the candle's flames can reach excessive heights and can ignite the bowl.

governance.s: Wikipedia "Litigation" section: In 1999 and 2001, federal lawsuits were filed against Cracker Barrel in Georgia. The former was brought by a group of employees who claimed the company had discriminated against them on the grounds…

sampleRecords.employer: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc.
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level from collapsing structure or equipment  less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was standing on a milk crate to clean the grill. The milk crate slipped and the employee's right hand fell onto the hot grill, resulting in burns to the right arm and hand.

sampleRecords.employer: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee set dirty dishes in the dish room. They turned to leave the dish room and fell on the floor, sustaining a fractured left humerus.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was standing on the third rung of a 6-foot ladder cleaning ceiling tiles when he lost his balance and fell off the ladder to the floor. The employee sustained a right hip fracture.

sampleRecords.employer: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc.
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A restaurant employee was walking to retrieve a drink of water when she slipped on the tile floor of the server's aisle and fell, resulting in a fractured right patella.
An employee was walking toward the work entry door prior to the beginning of their shift when they fell to the concrete and suffered a left humerus fracture.

topHazards.label: The candle's flames can reach excessive heights and can ignite the bowl, posing fire and burn hazards.
The metal leaves on top of the pineapples have sharp edges, posing a laceration hazard.
The buttons on the shoulder straps can detach, posing a choking hazard to children.
The pompoms at the tip of the toe can detach, posing a choking hazard to young children.
The battery compartment can reach temperatures up to 230 degrees Fahrenheit, posing a burn hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Orly Recalls Lavender Scented Candles in a Round Wooden Bread Bowl Due to Fire and Burn Hazards; Sold Exclusively at Cracker Barrel Old Country Store
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves lavender scented candles in a round wooden bread bowl. These three-wick candles weigh about 8 ounces and contain three strands of lavender on top. "CBOCS Distribution, Inc." and UPC 197712076826 are reflected on the label printed on the underside of the candle, as well as a warning on how to preve…
hazards: The candle's flames can reach excessive heights and can ignite the bowl, posing fire and burn hazards.
injuries: The firm has received eight reports of flames reaching excessive heights, including three reports of minor burns.
products: Lavender scented candles in a round wooden bread bowl

sampleRecalls.title: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store Recalls Decorative Pineapples Due to Laceration Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves decorative driftwood pineapples. They are shaped from tan driftwood spikes, have spiked, galvanized metal leaves at the top and measure approximately 19 inches high by 9.5 inches wide by 9.5 inches in diameter.
hazards: The metal leaves on top of the pineapples have sharp edges, posing a laceration hazard.
injuries: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store has received two reports of consumers cutting their fingers on the metal leaves on the pineapples, resulting in one injury that required stitches.

sampleRecalls.title: Fabri-Tech Recalls Infant Rompers Due to Choking Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Cracker Barrel Old Country Stores
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Fabri-Tech's infant shortall rompers. The red and white-checkered rompers have a toolbox design on the front and two buttons at the top of the straps that button over the shoulders. They were sold in boy's sizes 6m, 9m, 12m and 18m. The size, "Fabri-Tech SHANGHAI" and "PO# 906512 PD 12/8/16" are p…
hazards: The buttons on the shoulder straps can detach, posing a choking hazard to children.
injuries: Fabri-Tech has received one report of an infant putting a detached button in his mouth. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Classic Characters Recalls Infant Booties Due to Choking Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Cracker Barrel Old Country Store
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Classic Characters' infant knit Elf Booties sold in sizes 6 through 12 months. The SKU number 507665 and style number 28046 are printed on the price tag. The infant booties are green, with red and white trim, and a yellow pompom on the tip of the toe.
hazards: The pompoms at the tip of the toe can detach, posing a choking hazard to young children.
injuries: Classic Characters has received two reports of the pompoms detaching from the shoes. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Giggles International Recalls Animated Monkey Toy Due to Burn Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Cracker Barrel Old Country Stores
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Giggles International Animated Sing-Along Monkey toys. The monkey is made of brown and beige plush material and is about 9 inches tall. The toy is designed to hold a song book titled "5 Little Monkeys" and to sing the song when activated. A red music note is on the bottom of the monkey's right foo…
hazards: The battery compartment can reach temperatures up to 230 degrees Fahrenheit, posing a burn hazard.
injuries: Giggles International has received two reports of toys overheating and melting their battery compartments.
